title: Inventory Size Attributes
description: Adds entity attributes that control how many player inventory slots are accessible.
body:
# Inventory Size Attributes

This mod allows changing the size of the player inventory and of the hotbar.

> This mod does not change the maximum amount of inventory or hotbar slots!

By default the inventory size is not changed, this can be done via the server config or with two new entity attributes.

Details can be found in the [readme file](https://github.com/TheRedBrain/inventory-size-attributes/blob/1.21.1/README.md).
